<@profile.key>CODENAME: Zhuang Fangyi
GENDER: Female
AUTHENTICATION: Hongshan Academy of Sciences 
DOB: August 7
RACE: Kylin
[ORIPATHY INFECTION STATUS]
Oripathy negative, based on medical examination reports. 

[INTEGRATED PHYSICAL EXAMINATION]
PHYSIOLOGICAL STRENGTH: Standard
COMBAT SKILL: Standard
TACTICAL ACUMEN: Excellent
ORIGINIUM ARTS ASSIMILATION: Outstanding
</>

<@profile.key>Operator Zhuang Fangyi serves as the Viceroy of the Wuling Scientific Developmental District and also the Tianshi in charge of the Novel Xiranite-based Materials Project. Upon recommendation from the Hongshan Academy of Sciences, she entered into cooperation with Endfield Industries to conduct rift-related research.

My meeting with Tianshi Zhuang concluded with striking efficiency. She reviewed the cooperation agreements quickly, raised no questions or objections, and signed without hesitation — as though she were simply confirming a next-day onboarding notification, not committing to a partnership that would shape the next ten years and beyond. Where does such unconditional trust come from? Perhaps the Endmin has the answer.
— Martin Marvin Malen, Assistant, HR Division, Endfield Industries</>

<@profile.key>Ever since Tianshi Zhuang came aboard the Dijiang, there's been one more workaholic buried in the labs. 
The Tianshi approaches her work with great enthusiasm. Every day, she packs her schedule herself, ticking off each task without wasting a second. Her home back in Wuling City stays spotless — so clean it feels as though no one has ever lived there. In contrast, her lab is cluttered with personal items, as if that's where life actually happens. 
If not for HAS stepping in and ordering a mandatory break, Tianshi Zhuang would never have put down her work. Some feared that the sheer amount of work would soon leave Tianshi Zhuang collapsed at the lab bench. What they failed to realize was that she actually found the lack of work to be more unbearable. 
On the first day of her forced vacation, she gave an illusion of rest. But soon, restlessness crept into her expression, and stillness gave way to anxiety. She started pacing up and down the beach, worrying about everything back in the lab. 
With each passing day of the break, her mood grew heavier. By the end, Tianshi Zhuang who could barely get out of bed kept murmuring these words: "The lab ... I need to get back to the lab. The results could come in any moment. I cannot waste any more time." 
After the break was finally over, she returned to the lab with a smile so radiant that people thought she had a really beautiful vacation. In truth, she was only glad that the ordeal by vacation was over. Even Perlica, another widely recognized workaholic, was astonished by Tianshi Zhuang's professional commitment. 
There is a reason she works the way she does. She isn't the only one waiting for the results. The entire HAS, and Talos-II itself, are watching her progress closely. 
As rift disasters grow ever more frequent and devastating, every moment Tianshi Zhuang spends at work carries the possibility of a new solution. Her time is no longer hers alone, but generously sacrificed for those who have lost homes and lives to the rifts. She dare not, and she cannot allow even a second to go to waste.</>

<@profile.key>"I really like Tianshi Zhuang, but I don't seem to know her well." Every operator who worked with her feels this way. 
Tianshi Zhuang's past is easy to trace. Any visitor to Wuling City can get the basics from a local tour guide or receptionist. For those who wish to know more, simply dig deeper into the archives of the Tianshi Bureau Academy to peruse her publications, though reading them all takes some dedication. And those who manage to do all that would have a clear picture of the Tianshi — A scientist deeply immersed in her work, a Viceroy who has dutifully served Wuling for a decade. 
If you wish to set aside Tianshi Zhuang's titles and know her personally, seek out an opportunity to be her coworker. Most people describe their first impression of her as the soothing gusts of Wuling City in March: gentle, comforting, and refreshing. As a coworker, Zhuang could unravel even the most recalcitrant of problems. She would be the cool midsummer breeze that takes away frustration and restores balance. The comfortable peace would last until your experiment hits a bottleneck. And then you'd sense a storm quietly brewing beneath her composed exterior. 
Her speech would change. It becomes quick and relentless, like a sudden downpour of which few can keep pace. Her stride would quicken. Every step a violent gust, sending reports flapping and fluttering off the tabletops. And finally, her problem-solving would transform. Like a blitz, she strikes directly at the source of the issue to completely shatter it, a guiding flash of light in the face of doom and gloom. 
Soon enough, the problem is no more. The storm subsides. 
You might think you know Tianshi Zhuang after several tumultuous rounds of collaboration. But as you catch your breath, you would realize that you only saw her scholarly side of Her Viceroyalty more clearly. And then it hits you: she never talks about herself. Not to you, not to anyone. 
You had stepped into the eye of the storm — and found nothing but stillness. 

DOCUMENT: Hongshan Evening News Vol. 8 
Obituary 
Surgeon Zhuang Hanqing, a distinguished scholar at Hongshan Academy of Sciences, passed away due to illness last Sunday at 6:23 AM at Hongshan First Hospital, aged 42. 
A family memorial and farewell service will be held this Thursday in the main hall of Hongshan Funeral Home. 
Contacts: Her brother Zhuang Changqing; sister Zhuang Daiqing 

Communication Log 
Zhuang Changqing: Has anyone seen Fangyi? I've been busy all day. Just realized she's not in the mourning hall. 
Zhuang Daiqing: Don't worry. I'm with her now. 
Zhuang Changqing: That's a relief to hear... I'm glad you're here. She's just a child, and this is such a heavy loss. 
Zhuang Changqing: Ever since Hanqing passed ... she hasn't said a word. You know the girl better than me. Has she said anything to you? 
Zhuang Daiqing: No... She won't speak to me either.</>

<@profile.key>Shortly after the Wuling Science Station incident, Tianshi Zhuang was entrusted with managing several temporary shelters. Under her command, a strong line of defense between the disaster site and the safe zone was quickly established. She also provided essential support to personnel deployment, disaster site remediation, and supply distribution. 
Her exceptional performance during the disaster impressed the HAS leadership. Despite many other qualified candidates, they insisted on entrusting her with the rebuilding of Wuling Science Station. 
Under such pressure, Tianshi Zhuang immersed herself completely in research on Xiranite. At times, she even caught herself wishing she were a machine that never needed rest. 
In a sense, she already was one. The lab's countdown clock for Blight rupture simulations governed her every move, each tick tightening her focus. When the crisis eased, tension gave way to activity as she buzzed between the lab and the Monitoring Center like a fully wound-up clockwork doll. 
It was a period when she sacrificed much ... and missed even more. 
Then one day, something unexpected shifted her perspective. She looked up from her work, perhaps just to stretch, and overheard a conversation. 
"I'm starving, I really want hot pot..." said a newly joined Tianshi, acne still dotting his youthful face. Another Tianshi responded indifferently, "Stop thinking about food. You're here to do research." 
The young Tianshi gulped his coffee, patted his cheeks, and muttered, "Right. This isn't home. I should keep my mind on the mission." 
Tianshi Zhuang herself recalled how she felt dizzy and stunned by this incident, as though struck by a fierce bolt of Tianshi Lei Fa (Thunder Arts). 
When the dizziness faded, she clearly realized what she had neglected — the piles of food tins, stale air, exhausted faces, some colleagues curled up in corners asleep, and another opposite her with a back crooked after spending long hours at the lab bench. Desperately she searched for something green, only to find the glow of her terminal screen. 
She rushed outside in search of living green, but the pear trees along the path were close to shedding their wilted flowers. The daily routine of work kept her so trapped that she never noticed them in full bloom. 
In a lapse of stupor she had a flash back. There was a time when everyone gathered around her as she drew straight lines and gentle curves to draft a city upon a sheet of paper. 
What did she say then? 
She said Wuling City would be a home for everyone. 
So why had she forgotten? 
She had no answer for that. 
But she knew one thing: Better late than never. 
That evening, every Tianshi in the Academy heard Tianshi Zhuang's call. She raced through every departmental buildings as though possessed, loudly calling out for everyone to leave the labs and admire the falling pear blossoms. Many were taken by surprise and did not know how to respond, so she went door to door and urged everyone to seize what remained of spring. And when even that failed, she threw open the windows and let the petals drift into the offices. 
When people later spoke of that day, some laughed and said Tianshi Zhuang had worked herself out of her mind. She would only smile and say that she had worked herself to clarity.</>

<@profile.key>[Graduation Speech] 
"Hmmm... Greetings, everyone. I am Zhuang Fangyi from the Class of ██. It is truly an honor to stand here today on behalf of my fellow graduates. 
"I'm the youngest amongst you. Even fellow students who just enrolled are two years ahead of me. So I'd like to begin by thanking everyone for your care and support throughout these years. 
"Thank you for helping me reach the top shelves when I couldn't. Thank you for always saving me a front-row seat for the lectures. Thank you for holding back your frustration even when experiments stalled... 
"Most of all, although everyone spoiled me with loving exceptions usually reserved to a younger sibling, none of my ideas or suggestions were ever brushed off as childish. I skipped many years in school and lost the chance to befriend peers of my age. But in return, I gained invaluable friendships with those older than me. I missed out on one kind of companionship, but received guidance, mentorship, and trust from another. 
"Now, my next step is to continue my studies at the Hongshan Academy of Sciences. The colleagues I meet there are likely to be even more experienced... I also hope to learn from them and build new friendships..." 

[Eulogy] 
"I am keenly aware that many among you are far more suited than I to stand here today and deliver this eulogy for those we have lost. In the presence of parents, sons and daughters, lifelong companions, and loved ones ... I am but a mere youth. 
"I was the youngest member at the Science Station. The reason I could convey our longing on behalf of everyone is a result of your patience, guidance, and care... 
"I have made a journey blessed with support from all sides. I often asked my experienced peers how I might repay the trust and sincerity they showed me. They would always smile and tell me that doing my work and honoring the expectations placed upon me were the best means of repayment. 
"Though they are no longer with us, the trust they invested in me has not waned, nor has their faith in the Xiranite project. I understand that this is the moment to repay them in full... 
"And faithfully I shall bear those hopes and expectations upon my shoulders." 

Orientation Speech 
"Greetings, everyone. It is a great honor to welcome you to Wuling, where you have chosen to commit your most beautiful years to the laboratories, to this place, and to the forefront of our fight against the Blight and the Rift. 
"I know many of you chose Wuling because your parents and elders who sacrificed everything for the Science Station... Seeing your young, eager faces brings back memories — I sat where you are seated right now, and listened to your parents and elders who led me onto this path. 
"I once thought their greatest gift to me was the scientific achievements they had spent their lives creating. Now I realize the gift includes you who arrived at Wuling — who answered their call to follow their footsteps. 
"I once believed that the best way to honor their memories was to stay on that path and reach, without hesitation, the ideal future they dreamed of. Now I understand that I must also lead those who follow, to guide them onto that path and help them envision the future... 
"Thank you. 
"Thank you for choosing to walk this path with me." 

Recording: New Operator Welcome Party 
"Am I tipsy already? Maybe a bit... But this isn't right. I only had a little.. 
"Is this the ninth? Hmm ... maybe it's a bit too much. 
"You know, the last time I felt this happy was when I first arrived at the Science Station. They threw me a welcome party too. 
"I was very young back then so I only had juice. But I felt tipsy just the same, watching them toast cup after cup and laugh without worry. The mood was perfect. 
"Today ... feels just like that again. The future is laid out before me, waiting for me to step forward. 
"What more is there to say? Nothing... Just being happy is enough."</>

profileVoice.voiceDesc: Be it for foes or guests, we prepare fully before stepping forth.
How about a refreshing cup of tea before heading out?
Since you've sought my aid, I assume it's a tricky matter. How may I help?
It's been years since I last embarked on a mission... Hopefully I haven't lost my touch.
Even the finest weapon requires time to master. When I've grown accustomed to it, I'll share my thoughts.
This new one is indeed more powerful, but I've grown attached to the old one...
With each new thing I learn, I realize ever more keenly that my knowledge is but a drop in the ocean.
*Sigh* I can't bear seeing my clumsy self on the screen ... perhaps you could spar with me in person instead?
I only did what I should ... such courtesy is unnecessary.
Alright, alright, that's quite enough praise. If you're free, would you mind looking over the research I'm working on?
This is far too generous of you, really... Tell you what, a simple meal together would be more than enough. Or, should you visit the coast, a small salt-tolerant plant would make a perfect token.

...I truly appreciate your kind gesture. And I also have a gentle reminder for you: When you're able, please come to Wuling to claim your Honorary Citizen medal. And promise me you won't take it and leave without letting us know. We all want to hold a proper ceremony for you.

Endmin, before I officially come on board, I'd like to say a few words. As Viceroy, I am experienced in administrative duties. However ... here in Endfield, I wish to serve as a regular Tianshi and focus on research.
Did you just ... call me? Are you looking for my company?
Endmin, I added a new module to the Tianshi apparatus. Shall we see how it performs?
If you trust me, you can leave these minor matters to me. I can handle them on my own.
I'm heading to the lab. Care to join me if it's on your way?
Lovely coincidence. I was just thinking of coming to see you.
It's my first time on Dijiang, but ... my holographic projection has been here for meetings before.
I've given some thought to that giant Chubby Lung statue you asked for... Delivery is possible, but ... you might want to think carefully about where to place it.
Our cooperation plan with Endfield ... pardon me, with Wuling has concluded, and the experiment report has been uploaded. If you have time over the next few days, please be sure to take a look.
I didn't come to Dijiang for work this time... The pear trees in Wuling have fruited, so I thought I'd bring some to share with everyone.

When I was a child, I loved accompanying my master to the observatory. She would count the stars and point out one as Dijiang. I would watch it, thinking how far away it must be. Now, with Dijiang right before me, it is the memories that feel distant.

They say one should read widely and travel far. I've read a great deal, yet I've not visited many places. Hongshan, Wuling, and Dijiang make just three. This is hardly surprising, for I have a habit of lingering in one place for many years — ten, twenty ... or perhaps even a lifetime.
I've just returned from a work trip to Hongshan and brought you a few gifts. They are modest, but I picked each one with care... I hope you like them.
By etiquette, I should put it in proper storage, but personally, I'd rather keep it within reach, where I can see it at all times.

Oh, Endmin! Could you hold it steady while I fill in the soil? Had fate not led me to Wuling, I might have remained in Hongshan, working as a farmer or a Nongye Tianshi. My family has always loved tending to flowers and greenery, so our home was brimming with verdant life, refreshing everyone who visited. This is why, when I helped plan Wuling City, my first thought was: what fragrance should greet each visitor, and what atmosphere should embrace them.

Relax, I'm not here to haul you off to the Academy. There's a new noodle shop on Fangxing Avenue that serves braised meat noodles, and I thought I'd bring you along to try it. That said, why does seeing me instantly remind you of work? Maybe I should take a moment to reflect on that.

Wuling is hosting a "Three-Legged Race", and I was wondering if you'd run it with me. The course runs from east to west and then north to south. If we finish before sunset, we pass. Worried you might not make it? Relax, I was last year's first place. If needed, I can carry you the rest of the way. So fret not, we are definitely going to place.

What are you reading? Oh, it's about me? The paper we published earlier? Ah... I see, it's about my family. You could have just asked me directly. After my parents passed, my uncle and aunt raised me with great care. But they each had their own responsibilities and couldn't always be by my side. So, from a young age, I longed for more companionship. And yet, when I finally found friends, I started missing the quiet and peace of solitude.

Peace may have returned to Wuling City, but we can easily foresee the many trials and challenges that lie ahead. Don't worry, Endmin. No matter how difficult things may be, we will stay by your side. Winter always yields to spring. As the saying goes, the verdant season does not disappoint those who brave the snow and frost, as it shall wake as promised. And when the beauty of new spring finally arrives, let us go and admire it together.

What you proposed harmonizes well with our earlier vision, though the technical barriers have long eluded us. Now that a new path has revealed itself... Ah, forgive me, my thoughts were carried off by the fragrance drifting in from the window. The flowers have bloomed so early this year, how wonderful... Endmin, since the season itself invites us, shall we take our discussion outdoors?

Many of the plants in Wuling were gifts from Tianshi brought from their homelands. When I first saw them rooted here, I thought it was as though they had taken a piece of home and pinned it upon Wuling's earth, so they could look upon it whenever homesickness crept in. Only later did I realize that it wasn't just the seeds that had taken root — they had as well. To them, Wuling was no longer a stranger, but a home.

Add five milliliters of the solution... Okay, color change looks normal — no weird precipitate or cloudiness. Next, a little catalyst to bring out the flavor... Temperature is fine, nothing is burning. Dissolution rate looks okay... Hmm, Endmin? No, no, I'm not running an experiment. Actually I'm ... I'm cooking. Mi Fu always criticized me for living on instant food or takeout, so with some free time at last, I thought I'd try making something myself. Want to give it a taste?

Whew ... a moment, if you please. I just finished my morning run and need a breath. Y-yes, I'm aware it's five in the morning, but that's nothing out of the ordinary. Up at four, exercise done by five, at my desk by half past five ... this rhythm has carried me through more than a decade. No, I was never fond of sleeping in. There's simply too much I wish to do and achieve, so I trade sleep for time. That said ... what brings you alone to the lab at such an hour?

It will soon be the anniversary of my late seniors. Endmin, if you have the time, will you walk with me to the Serenity Garden? I still regret that I could not gather their remains and return them to their homelands. And I understand that no monument in Wuling can bring them back. Yet if, through these memorials, we can keep their memory alive, even for a moment longer, then their efforts were not in vain.

Of course building Wuling City right next to the rift is extremely dangerous. I knew that better than anyone else. But nobody wanted to relocate the city when we rebuilt it. Wuling inherited the duty of the Science Station, and the Tianshi will never falter. Nor will this city.

My predecessors placed the preservation of their scientific achievements above their own lives. Yet to me, it is their passing that feels like the greater loss. While Xiranite can be reproduced, the departed cannot return. I understand that in the pursuit of science, opportunities to begin anew are painfully rare. Even so, there are always those who choose to walk this path with resolve. Perhaps ... my predecessors understood this well, when they made their choice.

Mi Fu is ... quite interesting. When we first started building Wuling City, challenges came one after another, and I often escaped to the mountains to find peace. Don't laugh, but "finding peace" was just an excuse. In truth, I was quietly wiping away my tears. Back then, Mi Fu still belonged to Qingbo Stockade, and she would always come at me swinging her fists. Except that one night, she said nothing and simply sat beside me until dawn, keeping me company.

Right now, I'm faced with two choices: continue my Xiranite study, or turn to other pursuits. I know that even if I step aside, my colleagues at the Tianshi Bureau will carry on the research along its intended course. And perhaps it's time I contribute more where I'm most needed. Yet this project may be the sole legacy of my seniors; how could I possibly walk away from it?

Quick, sit with me and help me open these blind boxes. After the Xiranite forge at the Institute was decommissioned, the manufacturer and I embedded Xiranite elements into the 10th Anniversary Limited Edition Chubby Lung. They offered to send me a full set, but where's the thrill in that? Hehe. Besides, the odds of winning are one in twelve, which is quite generous compared to the unpredictability of scientific research, where even a lifetime of effort doesn't guarantee success.
There is something of value here. Our journey has not been in vain.
What a blessed land... I wonder what marvels are buried here.
The "unknown"... A profoundly alluring concept...
This is no friendly encounter. Proceed with caution.
When I was in school, I could collect minerals as efficiently as you.
Steady. I'll help you.
This is no ordinary object. It could have many purposes.
It's worth taking a close look at how Aurylene is collected.
I wonder if there's a way to clear the Blight more effectively.
Never hesitate to take a break. What lies ahead could prove even more demanding.
Here, use this medicine.
Much better.
Careful!
It's nothing. Don't worry about me.
Apologies... Endmin...
Clean and slick. Nice move!
Your execution was impeccable.
You flatter me.
Oh, it was a team effort.
We fear no hard fight, only a futile one.
I'll be right there.
Truth be told, this wasn't a hard-won battle.
Believe it, Endmin. Victory will be ours next time as well.
Thank you all for your hard work.
If you never give up, you never really lose.
So long as we still stand, nothing is truly lost.
Purge.
Abysmal.
Thunder roars!
Blades unleashed!
Storm awakens!
Ready when you are!
I'm with you!
Yield now!
Futile struggle!
How inept.
Incompetent.
A hush of thunder, a streak of rain.
A burst of storm, a birth of life.
A reign of blue, a lance of sun.

chr_0030_zhuangfy_ComboSkill.desc:
COMBO TRIGGER: When the controlled operator's <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> or Finisher hits an enemy with <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</>.
Zhuang Fangyi creates a Xiranblitz Array that attacks the enemy and deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. If the Array hits an enemy that has <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> stack(s), then it will <#ba.consume>consume</> the said <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> stack(s), forcibly apply <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, and give Ultimate Energy based on the number of stacks <#ba.consume>consumed</>.
If <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> is forcibly applied to an enemy that already has <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, then apply <#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</> +1 to the enemy's <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>.

An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>{poise:0}</> Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> and recovers some SP.

<#ba.consume>Consumes</> the target's <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> to increase the DMG multiplier of this battle skill and create [<#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</> of <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> <#ba.consume>consumed</> <@ba.key>+1</>] <@ba.key>Sunderblades</>. chr_0030_zhuangfy_potential_4.desc: Ultimate <@ba.key>Smiting Tempest</> improved: Ultimate Energy cost <@ba.vup>-{1-costvalue:0%}</>.

chr_0030_zhuangfy_talent_2_1.desc:
Gains a <@ba.vup>{base_rate:0%}</> chance of immunity against DMG taken, with each <@ba.key>Sunderblade</> nearby increasing this chance by <@ba.vup>+{sword_rate:0%}</>.
After DMG Immunity is triggered, Zhuang Fangyi is also restored for <@ba.heal>{heal:0%}</> Max HP. The HP restoration effect only triggers once every <@ba.vup>{duration:0}</>s.

spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_1_1.desc: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14%
spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_1_1.name: Viceroy Experience β

spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_1_2.desc: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 18%
spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_1_2.name: Viceroy Experience γ

spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_2_1.desc: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant operator EXP material production efficiency +20%
spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_2_1.name: Tianshi Chi Meditation β

spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_2_2.desc: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant operator EXP material production efficiency +30%
spaceship_skill_chr_0030_zhuangfy_2_2.name: Tianshi Chi Meditation γ

tag_expert_erudit.desc:
Erudite: Prodigy 
Her knowledge is vast and her experience extensive. She is often the first to figure out a solution in difficult times.

tag_expert_team.desc:
Team Management: Empathizer 
She is attentive to every detail when welcoming guests and handling various tasks. Working with her is like basking in the spring breeze.

tag_hobby_charity.desc:
Charity: Guardian 
A single heart beats within her, yet it alone has space enough for the entire city and everyone living in it.

tag_hobby_culture.desc:
Culture: Sunrise Industry 
She has plans for the future of Wuling, and they go far beyond Xiranite technology.

item_pic_1_chr_0030_zhuangfy.name: Complete Sync
item_pic_1_chr_0030_zhuangfy.author: Momoku
item_pic_1_chr_0030_zhuangfy.description: Getting this unlocks Zhuang Fangyi's snapshot: "Complete Sync". Operator snapshots can be showcased on a loop using the EF02 Slide Projector in the Reception Room aboard Dijiang.
item_pic_1_chr_0030_zhuangfy.decoDescription: Off-time, work-time, waking-time, or dream-time. It doesn't matter. She lives and breathes at Wuling's frequency.

item_pic_3_chr_0030_zhuangfy.name: Moment of Rain Held Back
item_pic_3_chr_0030_zhuangfy.author: KU
item_pic_3_chr_0030_zhuangfy.description: Getting this unlocks Zhuang Fangyi's snapshot: "Moment of Rain Held Back". Operator snapshots can be showcased on a loop using the EF02 Slide Projector in the Reception Room aboard Dijiang.
item_pic_3_chr_0030_zhuangfy.decoDescription: How good would it be if the spring did not rain, if the past never came, and if time froze over when we first met each other.

item_pic_5_chr_0030_zhuangfy.name: Forged and Finalized
item_pic_5_chr_0030_zhuangfy.author: LM7
item_pic_5_chr_0030_zhuangfy.description: Getting this unlocks Zhuang Fangyi's snapshot: "Forged and Finalized". Operator snapshots can be showcased on a loop using the EF02 Slide Projector in the Reception Room aboard Dijiang.
item_pic_5_chr_0030_zhuangfy.decoDescription: This time round, she intends to win.

0.desc: Guards are skilled at making enemies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</> and applying <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Statuses</>. They are also good damage dealers.
0.name: Guard

2.desc: Defenders are extremely tough. They are skilled in protecting and treating their teammates, as well as counterattacking the enemy.
2.name: Defender

4.desc: Supporters are skilled in applying various control effects that weaken the enemy. They can also buff and support their teammates.
4.name: Supporter

5.desc: Casters are skilled at applying <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Inflictions</> and <#ba.spellstatus>Arts Reactions</>. They are also good damage dealers.
5.name: Caster

7.desc: Great at recovering Skill Points (SP) to help their teammates' skill casting.
7.name: Vanguard

8.desc: Strikers exploit Physical or Arts effects inflicted by other operators to deal decisive damage.
8.name: Striker

tag_power_syndicates.tagName: United Workers' Syndicates of Talos II

adv.electricFence.desc: An active high voltage fence is impassable. Follow the cable, find the switch, and shut down the fence for safe passage.
adv.electricFence.name: High Voltage Fence

fac.hub.desc: The Protocol Automation-Core (PAC) is the central facility of the Automated Industry Complex (AIC) Factory. Storage management becomes available when standing in the Core AIC Area of the PAC.
fac.hub.name: Protocol Automation-Core

adv.eswitch.desc: A reactive device changes its operation mode when attacked or hit by an explosion. It is often used to switch off <#adv.electricFence>High Voltage Fences</> or activate <#adv.jumpMachine>Bounce Devices</>.
adv.eswitch.name: Reactive Device

ba.spellvul.desc: Arts Susceptible targets temporarily take more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.spellvul.name: Arts Susceptibility

item.quartzGlass.desc:
A fiber produced by refining <#item.quartzSand>Amethyst Ore</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.quartzGlass.name: Amethyst Fiber

adv.jumpMachine.desc:
The controlled operator can use Bounce Devices to jump across a longer distance or reach high places unreachable with normal jumping.
Simply stand on a powered Bounce Device, then jump to use it.
adv.jumpMachine.name: Bounce Device

adv.powerTerminal.desc: An electric nexus is usually placed at the end of a power transmission line. Connect it to the power grid to supply power to nearby facilities. Electric Nexuses are often used to power gates and switches. Supply power to Electric Nexuses with Relay Towers. This then grants control access to gates or switches linked to them.
adv.powerTerminal.name: Electric Nexus

ba.crystenhance.desc: Cryo Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.crystenhance.name: Cryo Amp

ba.airborne.desc: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then add 1 stack of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>, and deal <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</> and <@ba.poise>Stagger</>.
ba.airborne.name: Physical Status: Lift

item.bbflowerPowder.desc:
A powder produced by shredding <#item.bbflower>Aketine</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.bbflowerPowder.name: Aketine Powder

ba.burning.desc:
An enemy with <@ba.burning>Combustion</> takes <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> over time.
<@ba.burning>Combustion</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Heat Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_pulse" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_cryst" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_infliction_nature" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</>
ba.burning.name: Arts Reaction: Combustion

ba.crush.desc: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then <#ba.consume>consume</> all <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> stacks and deal massive <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</>.
ba.crush.name: Physical Status: Crush

ba.burningonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.burning>Combusted</>: Temporarily take continuous <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> that ignores their DEF.
ba.burningonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Combustion

ba.enhance.desc: Amped targets deal more DMG of the element it is Amped for. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.enhance.name: Amp

item.bbflowerSeed.desc:
Seeds picked from <#item.bbflower>Aketine</> with AIC Factory facilities.
Aketine Seeds can then be planted and grown at AIC Factory facilities to acquire Aketine.
Alternatively, Aketine Seed and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> can be used in the <#sys.manualCraftField>Planting</> screen and crafted into <#item.portSoilBbflower>Aketine Plots</>.
item.bbflowerSeed.name: Aketine Seed

ba.combo.desc: Next battle skill or ultimate cast by the team consumes the Link buff and deals more DMG, with battle skills getting a higher increase. Effects of the same type can stack, but with diminishing returns.
ba.combo.name: Link

item.procBattery1.desc:
A battery produced by packaging <#item.glassCmpt>Amethyst Part</> and <#item.originiumPowder>Originium Powder</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to supply power, charge up facilities, or traded at various outposts.
item.procBattery1.name: LC Valley Battery

ba.conduct.desc:
An enemy with <@ba.conduct>Electrification</> takes more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</>.
<@ba.conduct>Electrification</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Electric Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_fire" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_cryst" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_infliction_nature" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</>
ba.conduct.name: Arts Reaction: Electrification

ba.conductonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.conduct>Electrified</>: Temporary stun and take more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</> for a certain duration.
ba.conductonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Electrification

ba.physicalstatus.desc: Physical Statuses refer to physical debuffs applied to the enemy. They include: <#ba.airborne>Lifted</>, <#ba.knockdown>Knocked Down</>, <#ba.crush>Crushed</>, and <#ba.fracture>Breached</>.
ba.physicalstatus.name: Physical Status

ba.consume.desc: Various Physical and Arts debuffs can be ended early. For example, <#ba.crush>Crush</> consumes <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> debuffs, while <#ba.burning>Combustion</> consumes <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> debuffs.
ba.consume.name: Debuff Consumption

ba.poiseknot.desc: Some powerful enemies have <@ba.poise>Stagger Nodes</>. Deal enough <@ba.poise>Stagger</> to reach the <@ba.poise>Stagger Node</> to interrupt such enemies and make them stumble.
ba.poiseknot.name: Stagger Node

ba.statuslevel.desc: Status Level is the number of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> stacks (max 4) <#ba.consume>consumed</> when triggering a <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> or <#ba.spellstatus>Arts Reaction</>. The higher the <#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</>, the stronger the resulting <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> or <#ba.spellstatus>Arts Reaction</>.
ba.statuslevel.name: Status Level

ba.corrupt.desc:
An enemy with <@ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> gradually loses resistance against all elements. 
<@ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Nature Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_fire" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_pulse" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_cryst" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</>
ba.corrupt.name: Arts Reaction: Corrosion

item.plantMossSeed1.desc:
Seeds picked from <#item.plantMoss1>Buckflowers</> with AIC Factory facilities.
Buckflower Seeds can then be planted and grown at AIC Factory facilities to acquire Buckflowers. Alternatively, Buckflower Seed and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> can be used in the <#sys.manualCraftField>Planting</> screen and crafted into <#item.portSoilMoss1>Buckflower Plots</>.
item.plantMossSeed1.name: Buckflower Seed

ba.corruptonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.corrupt>Corroded</>: Cannot dash and suffer movement speed reduction for a certain duration.
ba.corruptonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Corrosion

ba.crystbreak.desc: To an enemy with active <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, applying <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> effects will <#ba.consume>consume</> the <#ba.frozen>Solidification</> to trigger Shatter that deals massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>.
ba.crystbreak.name: Shatter

ba.fireenhance.desc: Heat Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.fireenhance.name: Heat Amp

ba.rossi.desc: Rossi's battle skill applies a special status on the enemy. The affected target will take <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> over time, and suffers higher Physical DMG Taken and Heat DMG Taken.
ba.rossi.name: Razor Clawmark

ba.speedup.desc: Temporarily raises the movement speed of a target. The number represents the degree of the speed increase. Effects of the same type can stack until hitting the speed cap.
ba.speedup.name: Haste

ba.crystburst.desc: <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> + <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.cryst>Cryo Burst</> that deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to enemies.
ba.crystburst.name: Arts Burst: Cryo

ba.crystinflict.desc:
<@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.crystburst>Cryo Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Cryo Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_fire" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_pulse" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_infliction_nature" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> = <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>
ba.crystinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Cryo

item.plantMoss3.desc:
A plant that is characterized by rough, gritty leaves. It can be gathered from the wilderness.
The plant can be grown with AIC Factory facilities or cultivated with <#item.portSoilMoss3>Sandleaf Plots</>.
It can also be processed with AIC Factory facilities. For example, it can be shredded to produce <#item.plantMossPowder3>Sandleaf Powder</>.
item.plantMoss3.name: Sandleaf

ba.crystonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.frozen>Solidified</>: Cannot move for a certain duration.
ba.crystonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Cryo Infliction

ba.spelldmg.desc:
Damage can be divided into <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>, <@ba.key>Arts DMG</>, and <@ba.ether>Æther DMG</>.
<@ba.key>Arts DMG</> can be further divided into <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>, <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>, <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>, and <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>.
ba.spelldmg.name: DMG Type

ba.crystvul.desc: Cryo Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.crystvul.name: Cryo Susceptibility

ba.dispel.desc: This removes specific debuffs from the operator.
ba.dispel.name: Dispel

item.ironPowder.desc: A powder produced by shredding <#item.ironNugget>Ferrium</> with AIC Factory facilities. It can be used to produce other materials.
item.ironPowder.name: Ferrium Powder

ba.dot.desc: DMG over time cannot trigger critical hits.
ba.dot.name: DMG Over Time

item.bottledRecHp1.desc:
A capsule made by <#sys.manualCraft>crafting</> or filling <#item.plantMossPowder1>Buckflower Powder</> into an <#item.glassBottle>Amethyst Bottle</> with AIC Factory facilities.
Use this to restore an operator's HP. It can also be equipped as a <#sys.tacticalItem>tactical</>.
item.bottledRecHp1.name: Buck Capsule [C]

ba.fireburst.desc: <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> + <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.fire>Heat Burst</> that deals <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> to enemies.
ba.fireburst.name: Arts Burst: Heat

ba.fireinflict.desc:
<@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.fireburst>Heat Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Heat Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_pulse" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_cryst" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_infliction_nature" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> = <#ba.burning>Combustion</>
ba.fireinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Heat

ba.fireonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.burning>Combusted</>: Temporarily take continuous <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> that ignores their DEF.
ba.fireonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Heat Infliction

ba.firevul.desc: Heat Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.firevul.name: Heat Susceptibility

ba.fracture.desc: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then <#ba.consume>consume</> all <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> stacks, deal <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</>, and temporarily increase the <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> taken by the enemy.
ba.fracture.name: Physical Status: Breach

ba.pulseonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.conduct>Electrified</>: Temporary stun and take more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</> for a certain duration.
ba.pulseonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Electric Infliction

item.plantSpSeed1.desc:
Seeds produced by seed-picking <#item.plantSp1>Reed Rye</> plants with AIC Factory facilities.
Take Reed Rye Seed and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</>, then go to the <#sys.manualCraftField>Planting</> screen to craft them into <#item.portSoilSp1>Reed Rye Plots</>.
item.plantSpSeed1.name: Reed Rye Seed

sys.manualCraftField.desc: <#sys.manualCraft>Crafting</> lets you craft planting plots with plant seeds and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</>. Planting plots can be placed and grown at the Eco-Farm.
sys.manualCraftField.name: Planting

ba.frozen.desc:
An enemy with <@ba.frozen>Solidification</> cannot move, and applying <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or a <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> to the enemy triggers the <#ba.crystbreak>Shatter</> effect. 
<@ba.frozen>Solidification</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Cryo Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_fire" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_pulse" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_infliction_nature" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</>
ba.frozen.name: Arts Reaction: Solidification

item.plantMossSpc1.desc:
The Firebuckle is a plant that grows in the wilderness and is known for its exceptionally brilliant flowers.
There is a chance of getting Firebuckles when harvesting <#item.plantMoss1>Buckflowers</> in the wilderness.
They can be used for crafting <#sys.tacticalItem>tacticals</>.
item.plantMossSpc1.name: Firebuckle

ba.frozenonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.frozen>Solidified</>: Cannot move for a certain duration.
ba.frozenonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Solidification

item.plantMossPowder1.desc:
A powder made by <#sys.manualCraft>crafting</> or shredding <#item.plantMoss1>Buckflowers</> with AIC Factory facilities.
Use this to restore an operator's HP. It can also be equipped as a <#sys.tacticalItem>tactical</>.
item.plantMossPowder1.name: Buckflower Powder

ba.guard.desc: Protected targets temporarily take reduced DMG. The number represents the degree of reduction. When there are multiple effects of the same type, only the most powerful applies.
ba.guard.name: Protect

ba.knockdown.desc: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then add 1 stack of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>, and deal <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</> and <@ba.poise>Stagger</>.
ba.knockdown.name: Physical Status: Knock Down

ba.lastcombo.desc: Final Strike is the last sequence of basic attack. When the controlled operator's Final Strike hits the enemy, it also deals <@ba.poise>Stagger</> and restores some Skill Points (SP).
ba.lastcombo.name: Final Strike

ba.naturalburst.desc: <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> + <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.natur>Nature Burst</> that deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> to enemies.
ba.naturalburst.name: Arts Burst: Nature

ba.naturalenhance.desc: Nature Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.naturalenhance.name: Nature Amp

item.plantMossSeed3.desc:
Seeds picked from <#item.plantMoss3>Sandleaves</> with AIC Factory facilities.
Sandleaf Seeds can then be planted and grown at AIC Factory facilities to acquire Sandleaves.
Alternatively, Sandleaf Seed and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> can be used in the <#sys.manualCraftField>Planting</> screen and crafted into <#item.portSoilMoss3>Sandleaf Plots</>.
item.plantMossSeed3.name: Sandleaf Seed

item.portSoilBbflower.desc:
Aketine Plots can be cultivated at the Eco-Farm to acquire <#item.bbflower>Aketine</>.
These plots can be crafted by using <#item.bbflowerSeed>Aketine Seed</> and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> in the Planting screen.
Harvesting a fully grown plot provides plenty of Aketine.
item.portSoilBbflower.name: Aketine Plot

ba.naturalinflict.desc:
<@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.naturalburst>Nature Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Nature Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_fire" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_pulse" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_cryst" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> = <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>
ba.naturalinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Nature

ba.spellstatus.desc: <@ba.key>Arts Reactions</> are Arts debuffs that can be applied to the enemy. They include: <#ba.burning>Combustion</>, <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, and <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>.
ba.spellstatus.name: Arts Reaction

sys.manualCraftDish.desc:
Fine Food & Meds (Fine F&M) can be used as <#sys.tacticalItem>tacticals</>. 
Unlike <#sys.manualCraftTonic>Emergency Food & Meds</>, they can only be made using <#sys.manualCraft>Crafting</>.
sys.manualCraftDish.name: Fine Food & Meds

ba.naturalonchar.desc:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.corrupt>Corroded</>: Cannot dash and suffer movement speed reduction for a certain duration.
ba.naturalonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Nature Infliction

ba.naturalvul.desc: Nature Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.naturalvul.name: Nature Susceptibility

ba.pulseinflict.desc:
<@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.pulseburst>Electric Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Electric Infliction</> (<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_fire" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_energy_fusion_cryst" scale=1.25>/<image="BuffIcon/icon_infliction_nature" scale=1.25>) + <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> = <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>
ba.pulseinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Electric

ba.noguard.desc:
Hitting an enemy for the first time with a skill with <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> applies <@ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> instead of the actual Physical Status.
A <@ba.phy>Vulnerable</> enemy can be <#ba.airborne>Lifted</> and <#ba.knockdown>Knocked Down</> to add more Vulnerability stacks (up to 4). Hitting a Vulnerable enemy with <#ba.crush>Crush</> or <#ba.fracture>Breach</> will <#ba.consume>consume</> the Vulnerability stacks.
ba.noguard.name: Vulnerable

sys.manualCraft.desc:
Open the Backpack panel to access the Crafting screen. Different raw materials can be crafted into useful items.
For example, <#item.plantMoss1>Buckflower</> can be crafted into <#item.plantMossSeed1>Buckflower Powder</> for restoring HP.
sys.manualCraft.name: Crafting

ba.originium.desc: The Endministrator's combo skill attaches Originium Crystals to enemies and immobilizes them.
ba.originium.name: Originium Crystal

ba.physicalenhance.desc: Physical Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.physicalenhance.name: Physical Amp

ba.physicalvul.desc: Physical Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.physicalvul.name: Physical Susceptibility

item.glassBottle.desc:
A bottle produced by moulding <#item.quartzGlass>Amethyst Fiber</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.glassBottle.name: Amethyst Bottle

ba.pulseburst.desc: <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> + <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.pulse>Electric Burst</> that deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> to enemies.
ba.pulseburst.name: Arts Burst: Electric

ba.slow.desc: Slowed targets temporarily suffer movement speed reduction. The number represents the degree of reduction. When there are multiple effects of the same type, only the most powerful applies.
ba.slow.name: Slow

ba.pulseenhance.desc: Electric Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.pulseenhance.name: Electric Amp

item.originiumEnrPowder.desc:
A fine, dense powder produced by grinding <#item.originiumPowder>Originium Powder</> and <#item.plantMossPowder3>Sandleaf Powder</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.originiumEnrPowder.name: Dense Originium Powder

ba.pulsevul.desc: Electric Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.pulsevul.name: Electric Susceptibility

item.glassCmpt.desc:
A part produced by fitting <#item.quartzGlass>Amethyst Fiber</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.glassCmpt.name: Amethyst Part

ba.return.desc:
After spending SP and meeting certain criteria, some of the SP spent will be returned. 
SP Return is not "SP Recovery" and does not activate SP Recovery-triggered effects. Spending returned SP also does not give Ultimate Energy.
ba.return.name: SP Return

ba.shield.desc: The shield can absorb damage while it is active. Some shields may only absorb specific type(s) of DMG.
ba.shield.name: Shield

ba.spellburst.desc: <@ba.key>Arts Bursts</> are triggered by stacking <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Inflictions</> of the same elements. They include <#ba.fireburst>Heat Burst</>, <#ba.pulseburst>Electric Burst</>, <#ba.crystburst>Cryo Burst</>, and <#ba.naturalburst>Nature Burst</>.
ba.spellburst.name: Arts Burst

item.originiumPowder.desc:
A powder produced by shredding <#item.originium>Originium Ore</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.originiumPowder.name: Originium Powder

ba.spellenhance.desc: Arts Amped targets temporarily deal more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.spellenhance.name: Arts Amp

ba.spellinflict.desc:
<@ba.key>Arts Inflictions</> are special Arts debuff inflicted upon the enemy. There are 4 elements of Arts Inflictions: <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</>, <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</>, <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</>, and <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.key>Arts Infliction</> of the same element can be applied.
ba.spellinflict.name: Arts Infliction

ba.spellinflictonchar.desc:
Some enemy skills can apply stacks of <#ba.burningonchar>Heat Infliction</>, <#ba.conductonchar>Electric Infliction</>, <#ba.frozenonchar>Cryo Infliction</>, or <#ba.corruptonchar>Nature Infliction</>.
At 4 stacks of the Arts Inflictions, the operator becomes <#ba.burningonchar>Combusted</>, <#ba.conductonchar>Electrified</>, <#ba.frozenonchar>Solidified</>, or <#ba.corruptonchar>Corroded</> respectively.
ba.spellinflictonchar.name: Arts Inflictions / Arts Reactions on Operators

ba.vulnerable.desc: Susceptible targets temporarily take more DMG of the element it is Susceptible to. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.
ba.vulnerable.name: Susceptible

ba.weak.desc: Weakened targets temporarily deal reduced DMG. The number represents the degree of reduction. Effects of the same type can stack non-linearly.
ba.weak.name: Weaken

item.bbflower.desc:
A plant that contains flammable and explosive substances. It can be gathered from the wilderness.
The plant can be grown with AIC Factory facilities or cultivated with <#item.portSoilBbflower>Aketine Plots</>.
It can also be processed with AIC Factory facilities. For example, it can be shredded to produce <#item.bbflowerPowder>Aketine Powder</>.
item.bbflower.name: Aketine

item.carbonMtl.desc:
A material produced by refining <#item.plantMoss1>Buckflowers</> with AIC Factory facilities.
Carbon is essential for crafting <#sys.manualCraftField>planting</> plots, and can also be used for producing other materials.
item.carbonMtl.name: Carbon

item.plantMoss1.desc:
The Buckflower is a plant that grows in the wilderness and is known for its brightly colored flowers.
The plant can also be grown with AIC Factory facilities or <#item.portSoilMoss1>Buckflower Plots</>.
The plant can be used for crafting <#sys.tacticalItem>tacticals</> or other materials.
item.plantMoss1.name: Buckflower

item.crystalShell.desc:
A crystalline crust produced by refining <#item.originium>Originium Ore</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.crystalShell.name: Origocrust

item.ironEnrPowder.desc:
A fine, dense powder produced by grinding <#item.ironPowder>Ferrium Powder</> and <#item.plantMossPowder3>Sandleaf Powder</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.ironEnrPowder.name: Dense Ferrium Powder

item.ironNugget.desc: A metal ingot produced by refining <#item.ironOre>Ferrium Ore</> with AIC Factory facilities. It can be used to produce other materials.
item.ironNugget.name: Ferrium

item.ironOre.desc:
An ore that can be gathered from Ferrium Ore mining spots in the wilderness.
It can also be processed with AIC Factory facilities. For example, it can be refined to produce <#item.ironNugget>Ferrium</>.
item.ironOre.name: Ferrium Ore

item.originium.desc:
An ore that can be gathered from Originium Ore mining spots in the wilderness. It can be used for power generation in the AIC Factory.
It can also be processed with AIC Factory facilities. For example, it can be refined to produce <#item.crystalShell>Origocrust</>.
item.originium.name: Originium Ore

item.plantMossPowder3.desc:
A powder produced by shredding <#item.plantMoss3>Sandleaves</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials, usually by grinding.
item.plantMossPowder3.name: Sandleaf Powder

item.plantSp1.desc:
The Reed Rye is a type of plantable crop gatherable from the wilderness. It can also be acquired by cultivating <#item.portSoilSp1>Reed Rye Plots</>.
It can be directly used for crafting <#sys.manualCraftDish>Fine Food & Meds</> (Fine F&M).
item.plantSp1.name: Reed Rye

item.portSoilMoss1.desc:
Buckflower Plots can be cultivated at the Eco-Farm to acquire <#item.plantMoss1>Buckflower</>.
These plots can be crafted by using <#item.plantMossSeed1>Buckflower Seed</> and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> in the <#sys.manualCraftField>Planting</> screen.
Harvesting a fully grown plot has a higher chance of getting bonus <#item.plantMossSpc1>Firebuckle</>.
item.portSoilMoss1.name: Buckflower Plot

item.portSoilMoss3.desc:
Sandleaf Plots can be cultivated at the Eco-Farm to acquire <#item.plantMoss3>Sandleaf</>.
These plots can be crafted by using <#item.plantMossSeed3>Sandleaf Seed</> and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> in the Planting screen.
Harvesting a fully grown plot provides plenty of Sandleaves.
item.portSoilMoss3.name: Sandleaf Plot

item.portSoilSp1.desc:
Reed Rye Plots can be cultivated at the Eco-Farm to acquire <#item.plantSp1>Reed Rye</>.
These plots can be crafted by using <#item.plantSpSeed1>Reed Rye Seed</> and <#item.carbonMtl>Carbon</> in the Planting screen.
Harvesting a fully grown plot provides plenty of Reed Rye.
item.portSoilSp1.name: Reed Rye Plot

item.quartzPowder.desc:
A powder produced by shredding <#item.quartzGlass>Amethyst Fiber</> with AIC Factory facilities.
It can be used to produce other materials.
item.quartzPowder.name: Amethyst Powder

sys.tacticalItem.desc:
Tacticals are items that can be used during combat to provide various benefits and buffs. Every tactical has different activation criteria and usage limits.
Every operator can be equipped with 1 tactical. During battle, whenever the tactical activation criteria are met, the operator will auto-use their equipped tactical.
After expending all tactical usage attempts in a single battle, one more use will be restored after a while.
sys.tacticalItem.name: Tacticals

item.procBomb.desc:
Industrial Explosives are a type of explosive that can be produced.
They are made by using the Packaging Unit, an AIC Factory facility. The materials required are <#item.glassCmpt>Amethyst Part</> and <#item.bbflowerPowder>Aketine Powder</>.
Use Industrial Explosives to deal DMG to enemies or take down destructible objects within the blast radius.
item.procBomb.name: Industrial Explosive

item.quartzSand.desc:
An ore that can be gathered from Amethyst mining spots in the wilderness.
It can also be processed with AIC Factory facilities. For example, it can be refined to produce <#item.quartzGlass>Amethyst Fiber</>.
item.quartzSand.name: Amethyst Ore

sys.manualCraftTonic.desc:
Emergency Food & Meds (EMS F&M) can be used as <#sys.tacticalItem>tacticals</>.
They can be acquired by <#sys.manualCraft>Crafting</> or by using AIC Factory facilities.
sys.manualCraftTonic.name: Emergency Food & Meds

Arts Intensity influences bonuses to <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Statuses</>, <#ba.spellstatus>Arts Reactions</>, and <#ba.spellburst>Arts Bursts</>.
· When triggered, <#ba.crush>Crush</>, <#ba.burning>Combustion</>, <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, and <#ba.crystbreak>Shatter</>, <#ba.spellburst>Arts Burst</> deal DMG <@ba.vup>+{Damage:0%}</>.
· When triggered, <#ba.fracture>Breach</>, <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, and <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> deal DMG <@ba.vup>+{Damage:0%}</> and gain Effect Enhancement +<@ba.vup>{Debuff:0%}</>.
· When triggered, <#ba.airborne>Lift</> and <#ba.knockdown>Knock Down</> deal DMG <@ba.vup>+{Damage:0%}</> and Stagger <@ba.vup>+{Poise:0%}</>.
list.name: Arts Intensity
